title: Nemi Enthroned, Folio 54 (verso), from a Kalpa-sutra
description: Nemi Enthroned, Folio 54 (verso), from a Kalpa-sutra, c. 1475–1500. Western India, Gujarat. Gum tempera, ink, and gold on paper; overall: 12.5 x 25.7 cm (4 15/16 x 10 1/8 in.). The Cleveland Museum of Art, Edward L. Whittemore Fund, 1932.119.54.b
